title: Cassine hookeriana
taxonomy: Cassine hookeriana is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the genus Cassine, which is a group of evergreen trees and shrubs. The classification of Cassine hookeriana is further supported by its botanical name, which is derived from the binomial nomenclature system developed by Carl Linnaeus. This system categorizes living organisms into a hierarchical structure, with Cassine hookeriana classified as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Celastrales, family Celastraceae, genus Cassine, and species C. hookeriana. The precise classification of Cassine hookeriana reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
